home.philosophy: 合気道 – The Way of Harmony
home.quote: The path of aligning one's energy with that of others
home.aboutText: Aikido is a Japanese martial art that does not focus on competition. At the center are mindfulness, body awareness, and respectful interaction with others.

calm.title: Calm Training
calm.desc: Focused exercises in a relaxed atmosphere without performance pressure

levels.title: For All Levels
levels.desc: Open to beginners and advanced practitioners alike

tradition.title: Tradition & Modernity
tradition.desc: Authentic roots with contemporary teaching methods

competition.title: No Competition
competition.desc: Joint learning is the focus, not comparison

home.scheduleNote: A free trial training is always possible - just come by!

suitability.title: Who is Aikido suitable for?
suitability.intro: Aikido is suitable for people of all ages. You don't need any prior knowledge, just curiosity and openness.
suitability.bullet1: People looking for movement without competition
suitability.bullet3: Training of posture, balance and presence

cta.title: Interested?
cta.text: Come by and watch a training session - or get in touch with us.

form.title: Contact Form
form.subtitle: Write to us - we'll get back to you as soon as possible!
form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject

impressum.title: Imprint
impressum.content: The content of this website was created with great care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the content.
